name: components/sonner
description: An opinionated toast notification system that displays ephemeral messages in a stack, originating from the top or bottom of the viewport. Provides Toaster positioning, Toast styling variants (default, success, info, warning, error, loading), and rich content support including titles, descriptions, action buttons, and close controls. Built on Solid Sonner with promise-aware toast states, swipe-to-dismiss, and customizable durations.
useCases: Success toasts after form submissions, file uploads, or payment completions
Error and warning alerts for network failures, validation issues, or rate limits
Loading toasts tied to async promises that auto-resolve or reject with custom messages
Undo-action toasts that allow users to reverse a destructive operation within a timeout
